briefdescription.para: This function setups the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the audio formatter core.

detaileddescription.para:
XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.
This function assumes a Microblaze or ARM system and no operating system is used. This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2S receiver. It is called from an interrupt context when the I2S receiver receives a AES Block Complete Interrupt. This handler provides an example of how to handle I2S receiver interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2S receiver.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2S receiver receives a Underflow Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2S receiver interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2s Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2s Transmitter receives a AES Block Complete Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2s Transmitter interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2s Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2s Transmitter receives a AES Block Error Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2s Transmitter interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2s Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2s Transmitter receives a AES Channel Status Updated Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2s Transmitter interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the I2s Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context when the I2s Transmitter receives a Underflow Interrupt.
This handler provides an example of how to handle I2s Transmitter interrupts but is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function

briefdescription.para: This function is called from the interrupt handler of audio formatter core.

detaileddescription.para: After the first S2MM interrupt is received the interrupt_flag is set here.

simplesect.para: This function assumes a Microblaze or ARM system and no operating system is used.

briefdescription.para: This function is called from the interrupt handler of audio formatter core.

detaileddescription.para: After the first MM2S interrupt is received the interrupt_flag is set here.

simplesect.para: This function assumes a Microblaze or ARM system and no operating system is used.

briefdescription.para: This function does the lookup and initialization of the I2S transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2sTx driver instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the call is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function does the lookup and initialization of the I2S receiver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2sRx driver instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the call is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function does the lookup and initialization of the audio formatter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to audio formatter driver instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the call is successful, otherwise XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the audio formatter example using Interrupts.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS to indicate success, else XST_FAILURE to indicate a Failure.
